description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a dark gable roof and a clean, rectangular footprint. The front features a double garage with two cars parked on a wide driveway, and a covered porch area above the garage. The rear of the property includes a fenced backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, a green lawn, and a small patio area. The side elevations show multiple rectangular windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof and window frames. The overall design is contemporary, with simple lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern bungalow with a dark gable roof, double garage, and a backyard featuring a pool and lawn. The exterior is light-colored with multiple rectangular windows and a covered front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, driveway, and covered porch above the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long gable roof, multiple windows, and the backyard with a pool and lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, swimming pool, green lawn, and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage, and the side windows along the length of the bungalow.
